lead_profile_text: 7-bed country property on market for 5 years. Mike and Louise attending. Refurb needed (~1 month away, investing £25-30k). Previous LTL ~£6,000/mo. STL net ~£29,400-30,000/yr. Mortgage £2,970/mo. Primary goal: reduce outgoings while property continues selling. Comparing 2-3 other STL agents. Karl's current operator did a 21-day corporate stay.
emotional_profile: Pragmatic and cost-focused. Not trying to maximise profit — wants to reduce outgoings while waiting for sale. Cautious evaluator comparing multiple agents. Interested but not urgent.

top_objections.text: Comparing 2-3 other STL management agents before deciding
top_objections.zac_response: 13% discounted fee offer with deadline to incentivise decision ahead of competitor evaluation

top_objections.text: 7-bed has limited comparable data — projection less accurate
top_objections.zac_response: Net ~£29,400-30,000/yr presented as a range with acknowledged uncertainty for large properties

top_objections.text: Mortgage at £2,970/mo barely covered by STL net income
top_objections.zac_response: Framed as covering outgoings while selling — not a profit play; STL pays for itself during the sales process

top_questions.answer: 13% if signed before 8 May (discounted from standard 15%)

top_questions.text: Can the property stay on the market while doing STL?
top_questions.answer: Yes — STL and sales listing are compatible and can run simultaneously

top_questions.text: How are large properties and guest groups handled?
top_questions.answer: Full guest vetting applied; large group bookings managed with appropriate oversight

what_moved_them: STL income reduces mortgage outgoings while property remains on market
Renter legislation concerns validated — STL avoids tenant rights exposure
13% management fee with 8 May deadline created pricing urgency
what_fell_flat: Still evaluating other providers — no urgency to decide now
No clear commitment signal at meeting end
May update: Karl's operator did a 21-day corporate stay — temporarily satisfied with existing setup

conversion_gaps.gap: Competing with 2-3 other agents being evaluated concurrently
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Share portfolio case studies and client testimonials specific to large/unique properties; emphasise Stayful track record vs generic agents

conversion_gaps.gap: STL income only marginally covers mortgage — weak financial case
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Pull comparable 7-bed Somerset STL data; explore whether corporate/extended stays could uplift average rate

offer_framing: 13% management fee (vs standard 15%) if signed before 8 May 2026 — reduces cost while property continues selling
zac_income_intro: STL net ~£29,400-30,000/yr covers the £2,970/mo mortgage while the property stays on the market
zac_reassurance_phrases: reduce outgoings, not to maximise profit
